test_cases.description: Verifies correct Svelte 5 rune syntax for state, derived, and effects
test_cases.input: Create a counter component in Svelte 5 with reactive state, a derived doubled value, and a console log effect.

test_cases.description: Verifies correct server-only load function with DB access pattern
test_cases.input: Create a SvelteKit page that fetches a blog post by slug from the database on the server only.

test_cases.description: Verifies correct form actions with validation and fail() on error
test_cases.input: Create a SvelteKit contact form that validates required fields and returns errors.
